Created attachment 144903
Diagnostic

Wi-Fi Broadcom Corporation BCM43224 802.11a/b/g/n doesn`t work.

Sound IDT 92HD81B1X (Analog 2.0+HP/2.0) (pcm) found and works only in Sound Configuration Test sound from PC-BSD Control Panel, it is inactive in other places.

System fan permanently on high speed.

OS version 10.0.2
